CustomField.description: The date for disbursing repayable financial aid. This can be used scheduled flow to update the “Disburse Repayable Financial Aid” checkbox.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date for disbursing repayable financial aid. This can be used scheduled flow to update the “Disburse Repayable Financial Aid” checkbox.
CustomField.label: Disburse Repayable FA Date
